title: Sort Objects and Properties
text: Sort Objects and Properties You can sort items listed in the Uniface IDE by clicking the sort icon above the column header. The Sort icon is displayed above selected columns in the U-Bar, Resource Browser, Properties Inspector, and Structure panes. The appearance of the icon reflects the current sort order. Original order Descending order Ascending order To change the sort order, click the icon until the items are sorted in your preferred order. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
